Name: PLAY_AREA_PARAM
Description: Defines multiplayer area rules, invasion/search behavior, and restrictions for different online interaction types within a zone.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Zone ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the multiplayer-enabled zone or region.

Fields.Name: Cooperative Blue Phantom Disable Distance
Fields.Description: Distance within which cooperative blue phantoms are prevented from entering or spawning.

Fields.Name: Other Phantom Disable Distance
Fields.Description: Distance restriction for other phantom types entering the area.

Fields.Name: Area Type
Fields.Description: Defines the type of multiplayer area behavior applied to this zone.

Fields.Name: Enable Bell Keeper Search
Fields.Description: Determines whether Bell Keeper-type enemies can search or invade in this area.

Fields.Name: Enable Cooperative Blue Phantom Search
Fields.Description: Allows matching and spawning of cooperative blue phantoms in this area.

Fields.Name: Enable Adversarial Blue Phantom Search
Fields.Description: Allows hostile/reciprocal blue phantom matchmaking in this area.

Fields.Name: Enable Abyss Phantom Search
Fields.Description: Enables spawning or matchmaking for abyss-related invaders.

Fields.Name: Enable Boss Presence Check
Fields.Description: Determines whether boss presence is checked to control multiplayer availability.
